subcodes.title: Ziyarat Jami’atu'l-Kabira
subcodes.first_line: Praised be to God, the Lord of all the worlds. And may prayerful devotion [peace] be upon Muhammad, the Messenger of God, and the Seal of the Prophets.
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم [بسمه المکنون الرؤف]. الحمد لله رب العالمین و انما الصلوة علی محمد رسول الله و خاتم النبیین ... و اذا اردت زیارت حبیب الله او احد من ائمة الدین طهر ادلا جسمک
subcodes.subjects: @visitation Tablets, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @station of the Manifestation of God
